HR/Docs
Getting StartedFeaturesAPIБългарски

Available Clients

The HR platform exposes a RESTful API documented with OpenAPI (Swagger). You can interact with the API using any HTTP client. For typed access in TypeScript projects, the admin panel uses openapi-fetch with auto-generated types from the OpenAPI specification.

Integration Options

  • Direct HTTP — Use curl, fetch, or any HTTP library. The API accepts and returns JSON.
  • openapi-fetch (TypeScript) — Generate types from the Swagger spec and use the typed client for compile-time safety.
  • Webhooks — Register HTTPS endpoints to receive real-time event notifications signed with HMAC-SHA256.

Common Patterns

All list endpoints support cursor-based pagination with limit and offset query parameters. Responses include a total count for building pagination controls. Error responses follow a consistent format with error, message, and optional details fields.

Explore the API client guide for detailed examples covering authentication, CRUD operations, and error handling.
